soul_reaver.name: Soul Reaver
soul_reaver.description: A blood knight who sacrifices health to maintain relentless aggression.

engine_passive.name: Blood Frenzy
engine_passive.description: While below 50% HP, your Martial scaling is increased by 20%.

necromancer.name: Necromancer
necromancer.description: A master of life and death who fuels restoration with dark energy.

engine_passive.name: Soul Harvest
engine_passive.description: Defeating an enemy restores 5% of your total HP per Dark Potency level.

shadow_blade.name: Shadow Blade
shadow_blade.description: An assassin who strikes from the void with guaranteed lethality.

engine_passive.name: Void Strike
engine_passive.description: Attacks made while [concealed] ignore 25% of the target's physical mitigation.

warlock.name: Warlock
warlock.description: An anti-mage juggernaut who scales power with suffering and shuts down enemy engines.

engine_passive.name: Void Mastery
engine_passive.description: Grants Desperation (Damage scales with missing HP) and Shield Breaker (Ignores magical defense).

defiler.name: Defiler
defiler.description: A master of curses and afflictions who wins through attrition.

engine_passive.name: Lingering Rot
engine_passive.description: Manifestations that deal damage over time (Toxic) last 2 extra ticks.

assassin.name: Assassin
assassin.description: A dark-aligned specialist who excels at positioning and lethal backstabs.

engine_passive.name: Opportune Moment
engine_passive.description: Backstab damage multiplier is increased by your Lethal Potency.

black_mage.name: Black Mage
black_mage.description: The epitome of raw magical destruction, specializing in high-damage AoE.

engine_passive.name: Cataclysm
engine_passive.description: Blessings with the [aoe] tag deal 10% more damage.

death_knight.name: Death Knight
death_knight.description: A hybrid tank and dark caster who drains life to sustain in combat.

engine_passive.name: Vampiric Bulwark
engine_passive.description: Converts 10% of all damage mitigated by [protection] tags into HP restoration.

illusionist.name: Illusionist
illusionist.description: Deceives enemies by creating clones and distorting movement.

engine_passive.name: Mirage
engine_passive.description: Increases Evasion chance by 1% per Utility Potency.

ninja.name: Ninja
ninja.description: A fast-moving martial skirmisher specializing in precision and agility.

engine_passive.name: Shadowstep
engine_passive.description: Moving between rooms has a 20% chance to grant the [concealed] Manifestation.

witch.name: Witch
witch.description: A weaver of fates who binds enemies with disruption and reflects malice.

engine_passive.name: Fate Bind
engine_passive.description: When you take damage, there is a 15% chance to apply a [disruption] tag effect to the attacker.

rogue.name: Rogue
rogue.description: A versatile scoundrel who masters the art of utility and quick strikes.

engine_passive.name: Scoundrel's Luck
engine_passive.description: Utility tagged blessings have a 15% chance to not trigger their cooldown tick.

thief.name: Thief
thief.description: A specialist in speed and acquisition who turns agility into profit.

engine_passive.name: Quick Fingers
engine_passive.description: Your Attack Speed is increased by 2% for every point of Utility resonance.

soul_weaver.name: Soul Weaver
soul_weaver.description: A weaver of life threads who manipulates the boundary between restoration and harm.

engine_passive.name: Ethereal Loom
engine_passive.description: Restoration tagged blessings also apply a [protection] buff equal to 20% of the amount healed.

shadow_dancer.name: Shadow Dancer
shadow_dancer.description: A lethal performer who weaves dark magic into martial arts.

engine_passive.name: Danse Macabre
engine_passive.description: Your Speed resonance increases your Lethal damage multiplier.
